ddls:
CREATE TABLE "amphibians" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amphibian species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the amphibian */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the amphibian */,
  "subfamily" TEXT /* Subfamily of the amphibian */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the amphibian */,
  "subgenus" TEXT /* Subgenus of the amphibian */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "gaa_name" TEXT /* GAA name for the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Text description of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Description of the habitat where the species is found */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Description of the diet of the species */,
  "lifecycle" TEXT /* Description of the lifecycle of the species */,
  "conservation_efforts" TEXT /* Description of ongoing conservation efforts */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the species was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the species information was last updated */,
  "image_uri" TEXT /* URI to an image of the species */,
  "references" TEXT /* JSON array of external references (e.g., articles, studies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species to which the status applies */,
  "iucn_status" TEXT /* IUCN conservation status (e.g., Least Concern, Vulnerable) */,
  "isocc" TEXT /* Geographical distribution codes */,
  "intro_isocc" TEXT /* Introductory notes on geographical distribution */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Description of the population trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "threats" TEXT /* Description of threats to the species */,
  "protected_areas" TEXT /* Description of protected areas where the species is found */,
  "conservation_actions" TEXT /* Description of actions taken to conserve the species */,
  "date_assessed" TEXT /* Date when the conservation status was last assessed */,
  "assessment_source" TEXT /* Source of the conservation assessment (e.g., IUCN Red List) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_status_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES amphibians ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note entry */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species to which the note applies */,
  "synonymies" TEXT /* Synonyms for the species */,
  "itis_names" TEXT /* ITIS names associated with the species */,
  "taxon_notes_public" TEXT /* Public notes regarding the taxon */,
  "taxon_history" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomic history of the species */,
  "genetic_information" TEXT /* Description of genetic studies and information */,
  "morphology" TEXT /* Description of the morphology of the species */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Description of the behavior of the species */,
  "publications" TEXT /* JSON array of key publications related to the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomy_notes_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES amphibians ("species_id")
)
